_note: Track E / J7 (2026-07-16): per-species SHAPE PRIORS distilled from the subtyped reference corpus (wiki: reference-shape-guide-2026-07). SOFT priors only - injected as 'typical, not required' guidance into the Pass-B prompt (stage4_moments) and the S4.5 judge's evidence packets (evidence_packets). NEVER used as hard filters or rejection rules. Mechanical approval gate per the owner's dropped-sit-down rule: only species with n>=8 reference samples appear here (performance_rap n=4 and the wholesome hook exception n=5 were auto-skipped). solo_monologue = the promoted species (was irl_other; 12-13/16 justifications described it). Regenerate/extend by editing this file - both consumers read it at runtime, failure-soft. v2 (2026-07-17): numbers refreshed from the grown 115-card corpus (was 86) after the R3 validity audit; banter tightened 30->25s (corpus median 24.5, our clips ran 41s).

banter_roast.note: payoff lands LATE (final fifth) - keep the build before the beat, but the build is LEAN: reference banter runs ~25s median. Trim setup to the minimum that makes the payoff land.

freakout_overreaction.note: eruption lands early-to-mid clip (median ~59% on the grown corpus, earlier on some) - the value is the sustained reaction after it, not a late punchline

solo_monologue.note: story spine ~40s typical (range 30-60) - needs its full arc, do not tighten to banter length
